content:
Had a dream about Jeremy, my little boy. He was still his current 7 year old self. But he was driving the car with me in it. Somehow he fit in the driver seat no problem. Normal dream stuff. He was doing good following the road rules and I wasn't worried at all but he kept getting lost because he couldn't understand the GPS. Then it would tell him to stop or u turn, but he couldn't because he was on the motorway. He was frustrated but he was trying so hard. He wasn't complaining or asking for help. I looked up from my phone and noticed and offered to help, realizing I had been asking too much from him. I was so proud of him for all the things he had done. Trying his best even when it was hard. And doing it all on his own. Then he was a happy boy again. He ran out onto the road and directed me around a round about. I went through and he started chasing the car. I slowed to let him in but I couldn't stop there so I pointed to a carpark and tried to pull in. While he was following I was so worried about him running on the road. He didn't for a while but then the footpath swerved off so he did as the road was the direct route to the car. All was good. Then he ran ahead into some dystopian Asian cyberpunk flea market lmao and I got out to quickly follow. Then I woke up. 
Oh my little man ❤️
